overall.description: A cinematic game engine scene depicting a hooded character standing on a rocky mountain overlook during golden hour, gazing at a distant snow-capped peak and alpine lake. The third-person camera remains stable behind the character throughout the clip, capturing the dramatic lighting and atmospheric cloud movement.

scene_state.functional_zone: rocky mountain overlook with alpine lake view

events.description: flock of birds enters frame from the right, flying across the sky toward the left
character shifts weight and turns slightly to the left, causing the cloak to sway

agents.ego_description: standing motionless on the cliff edge with occasional subtle breathing animations and slight stance shifts, gazing toward the distant mountain peak

entered.detail: tall mountain peak with snow-covered summit, backlit by the setting sun creating a golden halo effect
calm reflective water body nestled in the valley between mountain ridges
craggy stone outcrop where the character stands, with moss and small vegetation
dense dark green trees covering the lower mountain slopes
jagged rocky peaks silhouetted against the bright sky

segments.scene_description: The character stands on a rocky cliff edge overlooking a vast mountain vista during golden hour. The sun illuminates the clouds from behind the snow-capped central peak, casting warm light across the scene. Birds fly through the sky as the character remains mostly stationary, occasionally shifting stance while observing the tranquil alpine lake below.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot captures a steady, cinematic gaze from a rocky cliff edge across a vast mountain vista bathed in the warm glow of golden hour. It begins with the hooded character standing still against the horizon, where the sun illuminates clouds from behind a towering snow-capped peak. As the character occasionally shifts their stance, the camera maintains its position to emphasize the scale of the tranquil alpine lake resting in the valley below. The scene remains focused on this atmospheric stillness, with birds drifting through the amber sky as the light continues to wash over the rugged terrain.
